scripts.smoke:browser: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/ferrum-web build && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/minimal-game build && node scripts/browser-render-smoke.mjs examples/minimal-game/dist
scripts.package:check: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/ferrum-web build && node scripts/check-package-files.mjs --require-wasm-pkg --verify-pack
scripts.package:publish-check: pnpm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @ferrum2d/ferrum-web build && node scripts/check-package-files.mjs --require-wasm-pkg --verify-pack --expect-publishable
scripts.smoke:check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm validate:game-spec && pnpm smoke:headless && pnpm build
